items.title: Credit risk modeling
items.description: Lenders train on historical applicants, validate scorecard thresholds on a recent quarter, and lock a final test cohort from a later quarter for regulatory sign-off.

items.title: Product recommendation ranking
items.description: Rankers train on past click logs, tune architecture on a validation week of traffic, and report NDCG once on a held-out test week before launch.

items.title: Manufacturing defect detection
items.description: Vision models train on line-camera images from Plant A, validate augmentation settings on a validation batch, and test on images from a new lighting setup at Plant B.

items.title: Clinical trial outcome prediction
items.description: Models train on patients from Sites 1–8, validate on Site 9, and use Site 10 as the locked test set — group splits prevent patient leakage across sites.

items.title: Demand forecasting
items.description: Forecasters train on 2019–2022 daily sales, validate horizon and seasonality choices on 2023 H1, and evaluate final MAPE on 2023 H2.

items.title: LLM fine-tuning evaluation
items.description: Instruction-tuning uses a train prompt set, validation prompts for checkpoint selection, and a separate test benchmark suite reported once before release.
